tools.name: realmint_my_wallet
tools.description:
Show your Realmint wallet (EVM + Solana), smart account, and balances.
    **Requires sign-in.** Read-only; moves no funds.

tools.name: realmint_deposit
tools.description:
Show where to send USDC to fund your buying power. **Requires sign-in.**
    Send USDC on Base to your EVM wallet; it funds your smart account for buys.

tools.name: realmint_buy
tools.description:
Buy `amount_usdc` of USDC worth of the RWA `asset_id` (e.g. 'paxg').
    **Requires sign-in + a one-time wallet delegation** at
    app.realmint.io/mcp/delegate. Realmint signs server-side via your Privy
    delegation, capped per-trade — no key, no per-trade approval. Your smart
    account must al

tools.name: realmint_sell
tools.description:
Sell `amount` of the RWA `asset_id` you hold, settling USDC back on
    Injective. **Requires sign-in + a one-time wallet delegation** at
    app.realmint.io/mcp/delegate. Realmint signs server-side via your Privy
    delegation — no key, no per-trade approval. Sells positions bought over MCP
    (h

tools.name: realmint_withdraw
tools.description:
Withdraw `amount_usdc` USDC from your Realmint smart account to `recipient`
    (any address). **Requires sign-in + a one-time wallet delegation** at
    app.realmint.io/mcp/delegate. Realmint signs server-side via your Privy
    delegation, capped per-transaction — no key, no per-withdraw approval.

tools.name: realmint_logout
tools.description:
Sign out note: Realmint keeps no signing session — server-side signing is
    your standing Privy **delegation**. To fully revoke it, go to
    app.realmint.io/mcp/delegate. Disconnecting the connector ends this session.

tools.name: realmint_list_assets
tools.description:
List all tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) indexed by Realmint.
    Returns the full schema for each asset including ownership, control,
    transferability, redemption terms, and legal metadata.

tools.name: realmint_list_instruments
tools.description:
List instruments — the real-world things tokens represent: an underlying
    at a specific denomination ("Silver · 1 oz") or a stock ("Apple"). Tokens
    sharing an instrument are interchangeable representations of the same
    thing. Each entry carries its member token ids, the recommended member

tools.name: realmint_list_market
tools.description:
Market snapshots for indexed RWAs: spot price, 24h change, volume, market
    cap, venue count, and a short price history series. Combine with
    `realmint_get_score` to compare risk against liquidity.

    Args:
        ids: Optional comma-separated asset IDs to filter (e.g. "xaut,paxg").

tools.name: realmint_get_asset
tools.description:
Get the full schema for a specific RWA by asset ID.
    Includes issuer details, control capabilities (freeze/mint/burn/blacklist),
    transferability restrictions, redemption mechanics, and legal documents.

    The asset ID is the lowercased ticker (e.g. "xaut", "paxg", "kau", "agri",
    "cgo").

tools.name: realmint_get_asset_history
tools.description:
Get the versioned metadata change history for an asset.
    Each entry records what changed (created, updated) and a full schema snapshot.
    Useful for detecting when an issuer changes terms or control parameters.

tools.name: realmint_get_score
tools.description:
Get the Risk & Rights Score for an asset across six dimensions:
    - backing (0-100): proof of reserves, audit cadence, backing mechanism
    - enforceability (0-100): governing law, issuer verification, legal documents
    - control (0-100): issuer power risk — freeze, mint, burn, blacklist, upgra

tools.name: realmint_get_route_support
tools.description:
List the venues and chains that can route this asset, plus per-venue
    backing/liquidity/social scores and policy flags. Use this to check
    whether a trade is even feasible before quoting — `routing_enabled=false`
    or an empty venue list means the asset can be inspected but not traded
    vi

tools.name: realmint_get_price_history
tools.description:
Time-series price history for an asset.

    Args:
        asset_id: Asset identifier
        days: Lookback in days (1-730, default 30)
        granularity: Optional explicit bucket — "5m" | "1h" | "1d". Omit to
            auto-pick (≤2d → 5m, ≤30d → 1h, else 1d). The server cascades to

tools.name: realmint_x402_buy_challenge
tools.description:
Get the x402 payment requirements to fund yourself in USDC so you can buy
    RWAs — the agent-native on-ramp. This returns the 402 challenge only; it
    moves no funds.

    To complete funding (two signatures total, the same a human gives), the
    agent then, ENTIRELY CLIENT-SIDE:
      1. Reads

tools.name: realmint_whoami
tools.description:
Return the signed-in user's identity. This tool **requires authentication**
    — calling it triggers the Realmint sign-in (OAuth) if you're not signed in.
    Use it to confirm who you're acting as. Read-only; moves no funds.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "realmint_x402_buy_challenge" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get the x402 payment requirements to fund yourself in USDC so you can buy RWAs — the agent-native on-ramp. This returns the 402 challenge only; it moves no fund…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: realmint_get_score, realmint_x402_buy_challenge · Private data: realmint_my_wallet, realmint_deposit, realmint_buy, realmint_sell, realmint_withdraw, realmint_list_instruments, realmint_get_asset, realmint_get_asset_history, realmint_get_score · Public sink: realmint_deposit, realmint_x402_buy_challenge.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: realmint_get_score, realmint_x402_buy_challenge · Private data: realmint_my_wallet, realmint_deposit, realmint_buy, realmint_sell, realmint_withdraw, realmint_list_instruments, realmint_get_asset, realmint_get_asset_history, realmint_get_score · Public sink: realmint_deposit, realmint_x402_buy_challenge

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
